nasb.text: “There also is Edom, its kings and all its princes, who for all their might are laid with those slain by the sword; they will lie with the uncircumcised and with those who go down to the pit.

esv.text: “Edom is there, her kings and all her princes, who for all their might are laid with those who are killed by the sword; they lie with the uncircumcised, with those who go down to the pit.

cnv.text: “以東也在那裡，以東的眾王和所有首領雖然英勇，還是與被刀所殺的人列在一起。他們必與沒有受割禮而下坑的人一起長眠。

ccb.text: “以东也在那里，她的王侯尽管力量强大，却和丧身刀下的人在一起，与那些未受割礼、下坟墓的人躺在一起。
